raw_consumer_statement: I ordered merchandise from XXXX XXXX  on XX/XX/XXXX and never got it. It said it was delivered to an individual with the supplied delivery tracking number. When i looked at the tracking info. it did indeed say it was delivered to the town I lived in. XXXX said i should take it up with the delivery company USPS. I did not get any help with XXXX XXXX  with the research. I then went to American Express to dispute who went by the information supplied to them from XXXX  XXXX  saying it was delivered and Amex said my account will be charged back which it was ( yet the Amex dispute is still open, expected to be settled XX/XX/XXXX ) However, the tracking never showed me vital information, my address, where it was shipping from and how much did the merchandise i purchased weighed. The vendor said they could reship but changed their mind saying it was delivered according to the tracking number info as well. That's when i couldn't get any answers through online and chat online about the tracking information, I decided to go to the post office and see if they could get me the answers and they did. While my address was indeed under the tracking number, it was not my address it was shipped to, the address that was used was on a neighbouring street and the package only weighed XXXX lbs instead of the XXXXlbs it was out of the box. I was scammed by the vendor XXXX XXXX  promoted on their site and the vendor also showed a picture of a packaged that was not at either address and had XXXX packaging tape on it. ( uploaded this picture ) Then weeks later the vendor said its now caught in shipping and i should get it in a couple of days which never happened. Just a total scam that XXXX XXXX  is standing by with just online chat help which i talked to XXXX different people with no correct results. I have Pdf 's of receipts, shipping from USPS intranet of the shipping info., the correct weight of what i ordered from the vendor unboxed. I have been totally scammed and with no help from the vendor, XXXX XXXX  and Amex dispute is ongoing yet from what they sent me they reinstated the charge. Please advise, thank you!
